description.overview: The Whippet is a medium-sized sighthound that combines elegance with athleticism and a sweet temperament.
description.temperament: Whippets are gentle, affectionate couch potatoes indoors but lightning-fast athletes outside.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to eye problems and heart conditions.
description.exercise: Need daily exercise but are calm indoors. Love to run in secure areas.

best_for: Owners who can provide running time
verdict.summary: Elegant, gentle sighthounds perfect for apartments. Whippets are calm indoors but need secure areas to run. Quiet and affectionate.
